ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_description" TEXT /* Description of the fund */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of fund (e.g., restricted, unrestricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_categories" (
  "account_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account category */,
  "account_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the account category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department head, finance officer, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "collection_amount" REAL /* Amount of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_collections_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_collections_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debt_service" (
  "debt_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debt service */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "principal_amount" REAL /* Principal amount of debt */,
  "interest_amount" REAL /* Interest amount of debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_debt_service_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delinquent_taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delinquent_taxes_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each account category
Unique identifier for each fiscal year
Start date of the fiscal year
End date of the fiscal year
Role of the user (e.g., department head, finance officer, auditor)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the transaction being accessed
ID of the user accessing the transaction
Date when the transaction was accessed
Unique identifier for each debt service
